original_input: Green Indian Dish with cottage cheese
working_input:
I am looking for this dish. Green Indian Dish with cottage cheese. Image description: Green curry dish with tender chicken pieces in a creamy coconut-based sauce. Thai cuisine featuring visible herbs like basil leaves, likely containing ingredients such as green chilies, lemongrass, and galangal. The curry has a smooth, rich texture with a vibrant green color. Served as a traditional Thai stew-style preparation.

Search keywords: green curry, Thai curry, chicken curry, coconut curry, Thai food, green curry chicken, Asian cuisine, spicy curry, herb curry

image_description:
Green curry dish with tender chicken pieces in a creamy coconut-based sauce. Thai cuisine featuring visible herbs like basil leaves, likely containing ingredients such as green chilies, lemongrass, and galangal. The curry has a smooth, rich texture with a vibrant green color. Served as a traditional Thai stew-style preparation.

Search keywords: green curry, Thai curry, chicken curry, coconut curry, Thai food, green curry chicken, Asian cuisine, spicy curry, herb curry

parsed_chatbot_response.response: Based on your description of a green Indian dish with cottage cheese, I recommend Palak Paneer - a vibrant spinach curry with cubes of fresh paneer (Indian cottage cheese) that has a striking green color from pureed spinach and offers a harmonious blend of creamy and tangy flavors.

retrieved_results.page_content: Palak Paneer is a vibrant and savory Indian dish featuring a rich spinach curry with cubes of fresh paneer (Indian cottage cheese) nestled throughout. The curry has a striking green hue from the pureed spinach, with flecks of spices adding depth of color. The paneer cubes are golden-fried, providing a delightful contrast in texture against the velvety spinach gravy. Aromatic spices like cumin, coriander, and chili lend warmth and complexity to the flavors. The dish offers a harmonious blend of creamy and tangy notes, with the paneer's mild richness complementing the earthy spinach. Fresh ingredients like spinach, tomatoes, onions, garlic, and ginger form the backbone of this wholesome and flavorful vegetarian curry., Ingredients: spinach, paneer, cream, spices, Protein: 15g, Carbs: 10g, Fats: 20g, Calories: 350, Dietary Warnings: Contains dairy, Type: Vegetarian, Rating: 3.8, Price: 6, Serves: 2-3

This aromatic Biryani dish presents a vibrant array of colors and textures. Tender pieces of chicken are seared to a golden-brown hue, nestled atop a bed of long-grain rice infused with saffron, creating a warm yellow tint. The rice is perfectly cooked, with each grain remaining distinct yet moist. Fragrant spices like star anise and cinnamon sticks peek through, adding depth of flavor. Garnished with fresh cilantro and caramelized onions, the dish offers a harmonious blend of savory and subtly sweet notes. Biting into this South Asian delicacy unveils a burst of rich spices, balanced by the succulent chicken and fluffy rice grains that melt in the mouth, leaving a lingering warmth and satisfaction., Ingredients: rice, vegetables, chicken, spices, Protein: 20g, Carbs: 50g, Fats: 15g, Calories: 400, Dietary Warnings:  , Type: Non-Vegetarian, Rating: 4.6, Price: 5, Serves: 2-4

This classic South Indian dish presents idli, soft and fluffy steamed rice cakes, alongside a vibrant sambar curry. The idlis appear pale and spongy, gently speckled with savory spices. The sambar brims with a rich orange-red hue, its thick lentil-based sauce dotted with vegetables and aromatic spices. The aroma promises a harmonious blend of earthy, tangy, and slightly sweet notes. Key ingredients include rice, lentils, tamarind, curry leaves, mustard seeds, and an array of warming spices like cumin, coriander, and chili peppers. This vegetarian delicacy offers a delightfully comforting taste experience, with the idli's mild flavor complemented by the bold, complex sambar gravy., Ingredients: rice, urad dal, carrots, tomatoes, tamarind, Protein: 8g, Carbs: 40g, Fats: 5g, Calories: 250, Dietary Warnings:  , Type: Vegetarian, Rating: 4.5, Price: 4, Serves: 1-2

metadata.name: Idli Sambar
metadata.ingredients: rice, urad dal, carrots, tomatoes, tamarind

retrieved_results.page_content:
This vegan burger presents a vibrant and appetizing appearance. The patty itself has a rich green hue, suggesting the use of fresh herbs or vegetables, while the bun boasts a golden-brown complexion speckled with dark sesame seeds, adding an enticing visual contrast. Crisp lettuce leaves peek out from beneath the patty, promising a refreshing crunch.

Inspired by plant-based cuisine, this burger offers a delightfully savory and satisfying taste experience. The aroma hints at earthy notes from the veggie patty, complemented by the warm, yeasty fragrance of the bun. Each bite delivers a harmonious blend of flavors and textures, from the tender patty to the crisp vegetables and the soft, slightly chewy bun.

Key ingredients include a veggie patty made from a blend of lentils, mushrooms, and nuts, providing a meaty texture and umami richness. Fresh lettuce, tomatoes, and red onions add a vibrant crunch and tang, while the sesame-studded bun offers a delightful chewiness and subtle nuttiness. A creamy vegan sauce or spread ties all the flavors together for a truly indulgent and wholesome culinary experience., Ingredients: plant-based patty, lettuce, tomato, vegan mayo, bun, Protein: 20g, Carbs: 30g, Fats: 15g, Calories: 350, Dietary Warnings:  , Type: Vegetarian, Rating: 3.6, Price: 12, Serves: 1

metadata.name: Vegan Burger
metadata.ingredients: plant-based patty, lettuce, tomato, vegan mayo, bun

retrieved_results.page_content: These crispy vegetable spring rolls showcase a golden brown, flaky exterior that gives way to a savory filling within. Originating from Southeast Asian cuisine, these rolls offer a delightful blend of textures and flavors with each bite. The delicate wrapper encases a harmonious mixture of finely shredded vegetables like cabbage, carrots, and bean sprouts, often accompanied by aromatic herbs and spices. The aroma of the freshly fried rolls is enticing, promising a delightful crunch followed by a burst of flavors on the palate. Served alongside a tangy dipping sauce, these spring rolls make for a delightful appetizer or light meal, celebrating the vibrant tastes of the region's culinary traditions., Ingredients: cabbage, carrots, bell peppers, spring roll wrappers, Protein: 4g, Carbs: 10g, Fats: 5g, Calories: 150, Dietary Warnings:  , Type: Vegetarian, Rating: 4.2, Price: 6, Serves: 1-2

metadata.name: Vegetable Spring Rolls
metadata.ingredients: cabbage, carrots, bell peppers, spring roll wrappers

final_output: **Palak Paneer** is a vibrant green Indian curry made with pureed spinach and golden-fried paneer (cottage cheese) cubes, perfectly matching your preference for a green Indian dish with cottage cheese. This wholesome vegetarian curry combines creamy spinach gravy with mild, rich paneer and aromatic spices like cumin and coriander for a satisfying 350-calorie meal.
